holdings.infoBox: ENHI is an equity ETF with a total of 632 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.43%, HSBC Holdings at 1.49%, Roche Holding AG at 1.35%, Novartis AG at 1.34%, and AstraZeneca at 1.33%.

overview.description: The iShares Enhanced International Active ETF (ENHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of international large- and mid-cap stocks. The selection and weighting of positions is based on quantitative models and big data to seek above average performance. ENHI was launched on Mar 10, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
